title: Deal to Reopen Hormuz Kicks Off Long Effort to Ease Energy Crisis
summary_full: The pace of the recovery will depend on how confident companies are that the deal between the United States and Iran will hold and be extended.
summary_public: The pace of the recovery will depend on how confident companies are that the deal between the United States and Iran will hold and be extended.
